query:
SELECT
                event_type as "event_type!",
                user_id as "user_id!",
                content as "content!",
                stream_id as "stream_id!",
                created_ts as "created_ts!"
            FROM room_ephemeral
            WHERE room_id = $1
              AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > $2)
            ORDER BY stream_id DESC
            LIMIT $3
